# Concert Workflow: Small Mission

Use this workflow for small, well-understood features. Planning stages (requirements, architecture, UX) are skipped. Vision feeds directly into task planning.

## Pipeline Stages

| Stage | Agent | Interactive | Description |
|-------|-------|-------------|-------------|
| vision | concert-init | yes | Interactive interview to create VISION.md |
| tasks | concert-planner | no | Decompose vision into task files |
| execution | concert-continue | no | Execute task files through the code quality loop |
| verification | concert-verifier | no | Verify completed work against vision |

**Note:** Planning stages (requirements, architecture, UX) are skipped. Use for small, well-understood features only. If scope grows unexpectedly, switch to medium or full workflow via `/concert:replan`.

## Stage Transition Rules

1. Vision is created and reviewed as usual
2. After vision is accepted: task planner reads vision directly (no requirements/architecture docs)
3. Tasks must still be reviewed and accepted before execution
4. Execution and verification follow standard rules

## Review Cycle Rules

See CONCERT-WORKFLOW-REVIEW-CYCLE.md for detailed rules.

## Execution Rules

- Execution follows CONCERT-WORKFLOW-EXECUTION.md
- Code quality loop follows CONCERT-WORKFLOW-CODE-QUALITY.md
